title: Tala 10A60133 Heavy Duty Foil Containers with Lids, Silver, 20cm x 11cm
features: Ideal for hot or cold foods
Helps to retain heat for take-away customers
Measures 20 cm length by 11 cm width by 5.5 cm height
From the Range of Tala Products
description: From the manufacturer Tala Heavy Duty Foil Transport your dishes with ease using the Tala Foil Containers. They are ideal for prepared meals to take to parties and events. Our containers can be used for storing and freezing food. About us THE HISTORY OF TALA Tala is one of the oldest and loved kitchenware brands. A trusted supplier, of baking and cake decorating equipment since 1899, Tala has grown to supply cooks and bakers all over the world. Taylor Law established in 1899, by Frederick Taylor and Thomas Law, to satisfy the developing Victorian kitchenware and hardware market across Britain. They produced a wide range of metal goods for the kitchen and garden which were successful and the workforce grew. The factory created products that ranged from baking pans and icing syringes to make delicious homemade food, to galvanised tubs and travellers trunks. The design and production methods remain largely unchanged, involving over 20 hand processes, and most importantly each cook’s measure is made by one of a small group of highly skilled people; be it Graham, Maureen or one of their team.
